emails.subject: asset management agreement
emails.body: Liz, For some reason I didn't get your voicemail. I'll stop by this afternoon to double check that you are OK with the EPMI entity in the role of Asset Manager/Marketing Agent in the North Carolina Power Holdings transaction that we are structuring with AIG/Highstar. Steve Steve Van Hooser Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith EB3877 Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-7238 Forwarded by Steve Van Hooser/HOU/ECT on 05/09/2001 03:29 PM Elizabeth Sager 05/09/2001 03:24 PM

emails.subject: asset management agreement
emails.body: Liz, Please disregard the following message. I did get your voicemail. The AMA that we are doing started with basically this form and has been pretty watered down as to the decision process we must follow. Thanks for your help. Steve Steve Van Hooser Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith EB3877 Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-7238 Forwarded by Steve Van Hooser/HOU/ECT on 05/09/2001 03:33 PM Steve Van Hooser 05/09/2001 03:32 PM
